game_name: Leisure Suit Larry in the Land of the Lounge Lizards

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Directional keys and text parser commands ('talk to man', 'open window')
Money required for taxi travel between non-adjacent areas; gambling in casino (blackjack, slots) to augment funds

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Early gameplay when accessing distant areas
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Walking between adjacent areas free; distant areas require paid taxi; failure to pay results in mugging or being hit by traffic

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Encounters with key women (sex worker, Fawn, Faith, Eve)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Women reject Larry initially; gift-giving system required to advance; sex worker available immediately (dangerous path without condom)
Purchasing condom at convenience store prevents STD death; enables time-limit removal
Deaths trigger automatic restart with humorous Sierra character cameo laboratory sequence; in remake, blender reformation
Seven real-time hours to complete (eight in remake); failure results in Larry suicide and game over; removed after condom purchase
Requires successful gift-giving to women; represents ultimate goal area

typical_relief_triggers: Purchasing condom removes time limit pressure
Successful taxi navigation to new area
typical_tension_triggers: Real-time 7-8 hour countdown to game over
Aggressive NPC rejections requiring gift persistence
Environmental hazards (mugging, traffic) for non-taxi travel
Pressure to reach penthouse before time expires
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating time pressure punctuated by resource management decisions; early game focuses on navigation and fund acquisition, mid-game on romantic gift chains, late-game on penthouse access race against clock

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Convenience store and casino present optional money-generation activities; multiple romantic pursuit paths available

difficulty_curve.early_game: Low - basic movement learning, initial currency of $94, exploration of adjacent areas without cost; optional sex worker path available immediately
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Moderate - resource management (gambling for funds), navigating taxi cost system, learning romantic gift preferences for multiple women, time pressure awareness
difficulty_curve.late_game: High - penthouse area access requires successful gift completion to women; real-time countdown pressure intensifies; final sequences time-gated

notable_level_patterns.description: Five distinct areas (Lefty's Bar, hotel-casino, wedding chapel, disco, convenience store) accessible from central location; adjacent areas allow free walking, distant areas require paid taxi navigation
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Starting scene outside Lefty's Bar as hub

notable_level_patterns.description: Multiple women with progressive gift-based interaction requirements; rejection patterns force persistence and exploration to identify correct gifts
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Encounters with Fawn, Faith, Eve requiring escalating courtship

notable_level_patterns.description: Early-game trap (sex worker without condom = death) teaches consequences; specific item acquisition (condom) removes time limit pressure permanently
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Convenience store condom purchase enabling unlimited playtime

notable_level_patterns.description: Money serves as primary progression gate; insufficient funds block taxi travel and romantic gift purchases; gambling provides only fund augmentation method
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Casino blackjack/slots as resource generation bottleneck
